zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Pype於大約1288年出生在英國斯塔福爾派 利德瓦雷時，他的父親Thomas Pype29歲，母親Johanne Jarpenville29歲。他和Emma de Stafford至少有1個兒子。他去世於1344年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾易亞斯特 斯塔福爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pype
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, Irish and English: variant of   Piper  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Scotland and Ireland.
Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of Pijper, itself a variant of Piper .

variants.name: Piper
meanings: English (mainly southern): occupational name for a player on the pipes, Middle English pipere, sometimes a paid town musician.
English: sometimes a variant of   Peppard  .
English: perhaps occasionally an occupational name from late Middle English piper ‘repairer or layer of pipes; plumber’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Pype was born about 1288, in Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England, his father, Thomas Pype, was 29 and his mother, Johanne Jarpenville, was 29. He had at least 1 son with Emma de Stafford. He died in 1344, in East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Drayton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Pypeが約1288年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアピペ リドワーで生まれた時，父Thomas Pypeは29歳，母Johanne Jarpenvilleは29歳であった。彼はEmma de Staffordとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1344年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエアスト スタフォードシュアイアで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Pype(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 스태퍼드실르 파이프 리드워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Pype(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanne Jarpenville(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Emma de Stafford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 이스트 스태퍼드실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Pype родился около 1288 г. в местности паип ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Pype было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanne Jarpenville, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Emma de Stafford. Он умер в 1344 г. в местности эаст стаффордшир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности дреитон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
